mismatch_triage.justification: The differences in assumptions are complementary and do not block integration.
The descriptions are complementary and do not block integration.
The purposes and patterns are complementary and do not block integration.
The scopes are complementary and do not block integration.
The software specifications are incompatible and block integration.

evidence.A_value: ice sheet model with grounding-line tracking
evidence.B_value: ocean model with ice-shelf cavity capability

mismatches.why_it_blocks_integration: The software specifications are not compatible, preventing integration.
mismatches.proposed_fix: Develop a common interface or adapter to bridge the differences in software specifications.

rules: Create a common interface for ice sheet and ocean models.
data_transform.example: Develop a middleware that translates between the ice sheet and ocean model interfaces.

steps: Implement an adapter layer that translates between the ice sheet and ocean model interfaces.
Ensure the adapter handles data conversion and communication between the models.

yaml_patches.A: update software specification to include common interface
yaml_patches.B: update software specification to include common interface

validation: Test the adapter layer with sample data to ensure compatibility.
Validate the integrated system with benchmark experiments.
